---
title: "DESeq2 Analysis Report"
params:
  run_id: "run_001"
  count_matrix_path: ""
  design_formula: "~condition"
  norm_counts_path: ""
  deg_results_path: ""
  pca_plot_path: ""
  volcano_plot_path: ""
  ma_plot_path: ""
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(knitr)
```

## Run Summary

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Run ID | `r params$run_id` |
| Design Formula | `r params$design_formula` |
| Count Matrix | `r basename(params$count_matrix_path)` |

## Normalized Counts

```{r}
norm <- read.csv(params$norm_counts_path, row.names = 1)
kable(head(norm[, 1:min(6, ncol(norm))]), digits = 2, caption = "Normalized counts (first 6 samples)")
```

## Differential Expression Results

```{r}
deg <- read.csv(params$deg_results_path)
kable(head(deg, 20), digits = 4, caption = "Top differentially expressed genes")
```

## PCA Plot

```{r}
if (file.exists(params$pca_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$pca_plot_path)
}
```

## Volcano Plot

```{r}
if (file.exists(params$volcano_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$volcano_plot_path)
}
```

## MA Plot

```{r}
if (file.exists(params$ma_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$ma_plot_path)
}
```

## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
